Hero.title: Professional Electronics Repair in Turkey
Hero.subtitle: Expert service for your valuable devices. Smartphones, Laptops, Robot Vacuums, and Watches. Quick, reliable, and guaranteed.

Services.title: Our Expert Services
Services.desc: Specialized repair for every electronic need
Services.phone_desc: Screen replacement, battery, and water damage repair.
Services.tablet_desc: Screen, charging port and battery repair.

phone.title: Professional Phone Repair
phone.description: We fix all major smartphone brands including Apple, Samsung, Huawei, and more. From screen cracks to motherboard issues, we have you covered.

laptop.title: Expert Laptop & PC Repair
laptop.description: Our technicians specialize in hardware upgrades, screen replacements, and performance tuning for all laptop brands and custom PCs.

robot.title: Robot Vacuum Technical Service
robot.description: Authorized-style service for Xiaomi, Roborock, Viomi, and other popular robot vacuum brands. Keep your home clean without interruptions.

watch.title: Original Watch Restoration
watch.description: Precision repair and maintenance for luxury and original watches. We handle your timepieces with the utmost care and professional tools.

tablet.title: Professional Tablet & iPad Repair
tablet.description: Expert repair for all tablet brands including iPad, Samsung Galaxy Tab, and Microsoft Surface. From cracked screens to hardware issues.

ServiceDetails.guaranteed_desc: 6 Months warranty on all parts and labor.

RepairProcess.title: Is Your Device Faulty?
RepairProcess.subtitle: Repair with Confidence with Professional Technical Service
RepairProcess.intro: As TR TECH, we repair your devices quickly, reliably, and with a guarantee through our expert team.
RepairProcess.process_title: We have made the process transparent and easy for you. You can safely send your device to us by following the steps below.
RepairProcess.step1_desc: Report the fault in your device to us. Our expert team will guide you and start the process.
RepairProcess.step2_desc: A special shipping code is created for you. You can easily send your device with contracted cargo using this code.
RepairProcess.step3_desc: Package your device securely and deliver it to the cargo. The shipping process is tracked by us.
RepairProcess.step4_desc: When your device reaches our technical service center, it is recorded and the process starts.
RepairProcess.step5_desc: Our expert technicians examine your device in detail. Fault detection is made and clear price information is provided.
RepairProcess.step6_desc: After your approval is received, the repair process of your device is started. All operations are carried out by a professional team.
RepairProcess.step7_desc: After the repair is completed, your device is tested. If you request, information is provided with photos or videos.
RepairProcess.step8_title: Your Device is Sent to You
RepairProcess.step8_desc: Your repaired device is securely packaged and sent to your address.

Trust.expert_team_desc: All our technicians consist of professionally trained, experienced and certified experts. We repair your devices with confidence with the experience of years.
Trust.warranty_desc: Repairs are covered by a 3-month warranty. Free inspection is provided during the warranty period.
Trust.secure_process_desc: You do not pay before your device is inspected. No action is taken without your approval.
Trust.no_payment: No payment before inspection. No action without your approval.

Verification.error_desc: Please try again or contact technical support directly.
